hello-world/pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 11 to Java 17 to target the new JDK version.
hello-world/pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile for Java 17 targets if the release property remains at 11, resulting in bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or missing language features.

hello-world/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 17 to ensure consistent compilation settings.
hello-world/pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit configuration, the plugin might rely on defaults or properties that do not align with the intended Java 17 target, potentially causing compilation mismatches.
